name: Starbloom
coopSpin: 2v2 teams share resources and coordinate one-command-at-a-time strategy to bloom across the map
winRules: Build the Starbloom wonder and survive the 5-minute countdown, or eliminate the enemy team by destroying all their buildings
moveRules: Each player controls a cursor to select and command units/buildings one at a time. Units auto-execute commands until given new orders. Commands: Move, Attack, Gather, Build, Train, Educate.
setupInstructions: Each player starts with a Nest (base) and 3 Sprout (villager) units. Gather Food and Gold from resource nodes to build structures and train military units.
artStyleNotes: GameBoy DMG 4-color palette. 8x8 pixel tiles on a 64x64 map. Bloops faction uses round/organic shapes (lightest fill), Zips faction uses angular/geometric shapes (dark fill). Units are 3-5px sprites. Buildings are 8x8 to 24x24. Non-violent poof effects.
